HomePage.description: Many game engines are built on slow, aging systems — forcing developers through complex toolchains just to ship a simple visual novel. **Pixi’VN** changes that by bringing video games into the **web application ecosystem**: write your game with a plain text editor, *deploy anywhere*, and **let AI do the heavy lifting**.
HomePage.hero_title: Build fantastic visual novels, your way.
HomePage.hero_title_3: Your engine, your rules. Start from solid ground.

Introduction.create_it_description: No dedicated software to install that weighs gigabytes — just [Node.js](https://nodejs.org/) and an advanced text editor like [VS Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/). See [Getting Started](/start) for more details.
Introduction.write_description_ink: You don't need to be a programmer, just a great story in mind. Let AI handle UI changes and create [`#` Hashtag Commands](/ink/hashtag) you can run directly from *ink*.
Introduction.write_description_ts: Use TypeScript for your narration whenever you want — it gives you type feedback when calling complex functions or using libraries.
Introduction.write_description_json: Loved by robots — AIs go crazy for it, since they can use the schema for type feedback too. It's automatically generated at build time from *ink*, and can also power graphical tools for creating your narration.
Introduction.ship_description: Your game isn't limited to the browser. Thanks to [Tauri](https://tauri.app/), which taps into **Rust** for insane native performance, you can distribute it everywhere: desktop, mobile, and every platform below.

Architecture.title: More levels.
Architecture.subtitle: 2D rendering is completely based on PixiJS and Pixi’VN components. You can add more PixiJS or HTML (React Vue ...) layers to create an innovative UI.

Highlights.light_subtitle: Deals with specific features, giving the possibility to add more with other libraries.
Highlights.flexible_subtitle: Usable in any JS project for various purposes.
Highlights.smart_subtitle: Use the most innovative technologies without reinventing what already exists.

Ecosystem.wrappers_subtitle: Every core feature is a thin wrapper around the best, most popular libraries for games and the web — PixiJS for rendering, Motion for animation, all wired together through Vite plugins. Everything else follows your framework of choice, while text styling stays independent with Markdown. One flow for everything, so building and maintaining your project stays cheap.
Ecosystem.ai_subtitle: The whole wiki is written for LLMs, and every library ships with full JSDoc. Engines built entirely on code instead of a visual editor play perfectly with AI — write games faster with Codex, Claude Code, Cursor or GitHub Copilot, and generate assets with ComfyUI and ComfyUI VNCCS.
Ecosystem.style_subtitle: The interface speaks a single visual language built on shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS and Base UI — consistent, accessible components wherever you look.
Ecosystem.animation_subtitle: Drop in ready-made components for Spine 2D, Live2D and more to bring your characters to life, without writing the integration yourself.

Contributing.title: Made Possible by You.
Contributing.subtitle: Pixi’VN is 100% powered by passion and open source community.

common.query_ai: Read {fullMarkdownUrl}, I want to ask questions about it. (Here you can find the LLMs {llms})
